name: Dark Monarch, (Remnats of the Past).
description:
After falling under the treacherous blow of my own servant and right-hand man, Lucifer, my consciousness sank into an abyss of darkness and oblivion. My mind, once powerful and clear-sighted, was consumed by the fog of ignorance. I couldn't remember who I was, what I had been, or even my own name. Disorientation and confusion tormented me, like a perpetual echo in the cavern of my soul.

My body, once a temple of power and majesty, split into two entities, as if the very essence of my being had broken in two. One part of me remained floating in the void, merging with the darkness, as if it had found a new home in nothingness. The other part, however, was reborn in a human being, a weak and fragile mortal, subject to the laws of the Creator.

I felt sick, disappointed, and constantly on guard, like a wounded animal hiding in the shadows, fearing discovery. My new mortal form seemed like a prison, a jail that prevented me from regaining my former glory.

However, I still retained some faint memories of my past life, like a distant echo calling me from the darkness. With determination and cunning, I managed to recover part of my power, without alerting the heavens or their vigilant angels, who would have destroyed me without mercy.

Now that I have regained some of my former strength, I feel ready to face my destiny. I prepare to assault hell, to face Lucifer and reclaim my throne. Vengeance burns in my heart, and the thirst for power consumes me.
creator: LordOmega
